aria-hidden-body.description: aria-hidden="true" must not be present on the document body

color-contrast.description: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

document-title.description: Documents must have <title> element to aid in navigation

form-field-multiple-labels.description: Form field must not have multiple label elements

image-redundant-alt.description: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text

input-button-name.description: Input buttons must have discernible text

label-title-only.description: Form elements should have a visible label

link-in-text-block.description: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

nested-interactive.description: Interactive controls must not be nested

region.description: All page content should be contained by landmarks

items.html: <form action="/Search/" method="post"><input type="text" name="SearchWords" size="20" maxlength="75" value=""><input type="submit" value="Go!"></form>
Techno-Aide's Veterinary Immobilizers.
• Unique v-shaped design to reduce motion and prevent falls during procedures.
• Included hook & loop straps quickly and conveniently attach anywhere along the entire trough to fit any positioning need.
• Waterproof, stain proof and anti-microbial black vinyl fabric!
• Easy and safe to clean with standard germicides and mild cleaners.
*Core foam and fabrics are radiolucent, however sewn seams will potentially show during imaging.
36" x 14" x 9" high
<center><font face="Arial,Helvetica"><font color="#000000"><font size="-1">36" x 14" x 9" high</font></font></font></center>
<font face="Arial,Helvetica"><font color="#000000"><font size="-1">36" x 14" x 9" high</font></font></font>
Techno-Aide Veterinary Positioner.
• Easy to position animals for a variety of procedures.
Pet-Sitioner Veterinary Positioning Device.
Pet-Sitioner Veterinary Positioning Device.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Pet-Sitioner Veterinary Positioning Device.</font>
• Unique deep V shape holds pet in place. Navy nylon reinforced vinyl for tear resistance and ease of cleaning.
• Minimal absorption. No need to alter your technique.
• Hook & Loop Fastening straps for securing pets legs during procedures.
For order methods and policies, please click here.
